title: DJI Mini 4K Drone Fly More Combo - Grey
subtitle: DJI Mini 4K Drone
overview:
Some important info: when flying a drone in the UK you must follow The Drone Code as set out by The Civil Aviation Authority (CAA). It is illegal to fly a drone without the required IDs. For most drones, starting from 100 g or over, you must pass both the drone test and register with the CAA before you fly. Never fly in an airport's flight restriction zone and other restricted zones. For more information visit caa.co.uk/drones.The DJI Mini 2 4K is practically as light as your smartphone so, you can stow it away in a backpack without any fussIt can fly and record 4K video up to 6 miles away for some truly epic views. A flight time of up to 31 minutes gives you plenty of chances to nail those aerial shots.
Good to know- It flies smooth and steady in winds of up to 23 mph, so windy coastlines or valleys won't be a problem- The DJI Fly app makes flying and recording video simple – it will teach you how to use the drone step-by-step- The Auto Takeoffand Return to Home functions lets you fly
key_features: Includes 3 batteries / charger / extra propellers / bag

specs.value: Return home, Altitude assistance, Stable hovering, Return to home, Quickshots, Panorama, 3-Axis Gimbal, 360° Propeller Guard

title: DJI Neo Fly More Combo with RC-N3 Remote Controller - Grey
subtitle: DJI Neo Fly More
overview: Some important info: when flying a drone in the UK you must follow The Drone Code as set out by The Civil Aviation Authority (CAA). It is illegal to fly a drone without the required IDs. For most drones, starting from 100 g or over, you must pass both the drone test and register with the CAA before you fly. Never fly in an airport's flight restriction zone and other restricted zones. For more information visit caa.co.uk/drones.The DJI Neo has a neat little party trick. It can take off and land on the palm of your hand. Simply press a button to pick your shooting mode and it'll automatically capture footage for you. No remote needed. AI Subject Tracking puts you in the frame. It can follow you on a bike ride or hike and match your pace for some seriously epic content. QuickShots mean even rookies can grab cinematic footage. Pick from 6 intelligent shooting modes like Helix (which spirals around your subject) and Boomerang (which does what it says on the tin).Good to know- The ½” sensor

specs.value: Climb:, 0.5 m/s (Cine mode), 2 m/s (Normal mode), 3 m/s (Sport mode),Descent:, 0.5 m/s (Cine mode), 2 m/s (Normal mode), 2 m/s (Sport mode)

Palm takeoff and landing, AI subject tracking, QuickShots, Controller-free aerial filming, Voice control with DJI Fly, Up to Level-4 wind condition, 40 minutes of 4K video storage, One-Tap glamour, Automatic Return to Home
